zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II於大約1069年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 魁奈時，他的父親Ralph de Chesney26歲，母親Lady Maud de Waterville22歲。他於1094年與Aeliz de Maminot在英國素可庫費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1147年1月8日在英國英格蘭素可紐姆享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II于大约1069年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 魁奈时，他的父亲Ralph de Chesney26岁，母亲Lady Maud de Waterville22岁。他于1094年与Aeliz de Maminot在英国素可庫費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1147年1月8日在英国英格兰素可紐姆享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II was born about 1069, in Le Quesnay, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Ralph de Chesney, was 26 and his mother, Lady Maud de Waterville, was 22. He married Aeliz de Maminot in 1094, in Cuckfield, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 January 1147, in Newtimber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II est né environ 1069, à Le Quesnay, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Ralph de Chesney, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Waterville, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Aeliz de Maminot en 1094, à Cuckfield, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1147, à Newtimber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II um 1069 in Le Quesnay, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Chesney 26 und seine Mutter Lady Maud de Waterville 22. Er hat 1094 in Cuckfield, Sussex, England Aeliz de Maminot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1147 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Newtimber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II è nato il circa 1069 nel Le Quesnay, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Ralph de Chesney, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud de Waterville, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Aeliz de Maminot nel 1094, nel Cuckfield, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1147, nel Newtimber, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne IIが約1069年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメル クエスナイで生まれた時，父Ralph de Chesneyは26歳，母Lady Maud de Watervilleは22歳であった。1094年にイギリススセックスクウクフィールドでAeliz de Maminotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1147年1月8日にイギリスイギリススセックスニューティンバーで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II(이)가 대략 1069년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 일 크스나이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Chesney(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud de Waterville(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1094년 영국 수세스 cck필드에서 Aeliz de Maminot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1147년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 뉴팀버에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II nasceu aproximadamente 1069, em Le Quesnay, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Ralph de Chesney, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud de Waterville, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Aeliz de Maminot em 1094, em Cuckfield, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1147, em Newtimber, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II родился около 1069 г. в местности л куеснеи, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ralph de Chesney было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Waterville, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Aeliz de Maminot в 1094 г. в местности куккфиелд, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 января 1147 г. в местности нютимбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II nació aproximadamente 1069, en Le Quesnay, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Ralph de Chesney, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Maud de Waterville, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Aeliz de Maminot en 1094, en Cuckfield, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1147, en Newtimber, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
